We believe in celebrating every chance we get, so obviously when we saw your
birthday was coming up — we had to make sure you weren’t going to let this very
special day just float on by.

Instead of stressing over who to invite to your dinner, celebrate the way you
deserve — on board one of our gorgeous lady ships.

When you decide to ring in your birthday at sea with your whole crew, we make it
easy to book, link your reservations, and dine together with (birthday
extraordinaire) concierge services — plus a bottle of bubbly per cabin. Because
what’s another year around the sun (with views of the sea, of course) without a
proper toast?
